title: How do I create a RAID Log using Monday
excerpt: I am trying to create a RAID Log using Monday but there doesn’t seem to be the necessary fields / options to make it. Can anyone help?

posts.author: Kishan (Kishan Patel)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to create a RAID Log using Monday but there doesn’t seem to be the necessary fields / options to make it. Can anyone help?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Kishan - What fields are you missing? And can you share a screenshot of software/platform you use(d) to manage your RAID log?
